sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63870" key="locoperipa/thtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοξο-περιπάτητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n63870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walking sideways</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">gloss on </abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:295" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">295</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
